name: Process Discovery Enumeration
description: Detects process listing used for reconnaissance
query:
// Detect process enumeration
// Trigger on tasklist, ps, or Get-Process from non-standard parents
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(tasklist|Get-Process|wmic\s+process\s+list|ps\s+aux|ps\s+-ef)"
  and parent_exe matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|bash|sh)$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
